description: Backend data contract for Add Teacher page – multi-step form: personal info, teaching details, access credentials.

createTeacher.description: Create a new teacher record. Includes personal info, teaching details, and portal credentials. Password will be hashed before storage.

requestBody.salutation: enum: Mr., Ms., Mrs., Dr. (optional, default 'Mr.')
requestBody.subject: string (required, primary subject – must be in the allowed list)
requestBody.qualification: enum (required, must be one of predefined qualifications)
assignedClasses: array of strings (required, at least one, each class name must exist in system)
requestBody.password: string (required, min 8 chars, strength validated frontend)
requestBody.confirmPassword: string (required, must match password – validated frontend only)

400.message: Validation error – missing required fields or invalid data

409.message: Email or phone number already registered

404.message: One or more assigned classes not found

checkEmailAvailability.description: Check if an email address is already used by any teacher.

checkPhoneAvailability.description: Check if a phone number is already used by any teacher.

getDropdownOptions.description: Fetch all static dropdown data needed for the form: subjects, classes, qualifications, salutations.

fieldNotes.email: Required, must be unique across teachers. Will be used for portal login.
fieldNotes.phone: Required, must be unique across teachers. Format should be validated on backend (e.g., Indian +91 10-digit).
fieldNotes.subject: Must match one of the predefined subjects. Primary subject for the teacher.
fieldNotes.qualification: Must be one of the predefined qualifications.
fieldNotes.assignedClasses: Array of class-section strings (e.g., 'Class 5-A'). Each must correspond to an existing class in the school.
fieldNotes.employeeId: Optional but must be unique if provided. Useful for HR integration.
fieldNotes.password: Will be hashed (bcrypt) before storing. Minimum 8 characters, no other restrictions enforced by backend – frontend shows strength meter.
fieldNotes.confirmPassword: Not sent to backend; validated only on frontend.
fieldNotes.role: Determines permissions in the teacher portal. 'Class Teacher' may have additional access.
